title: Align zed-agentops-init.sh behavior and guidance
summary: Update zed-agentops-init.sh so its behavior, comments, and usage align with current MCP server expectations and .rules guidance.
acceptance_criteria: zed-agentops-init.sh behavior matches the MCP server runtime expectations.
Script comments and usage guidance align with .rules and README* updates.
Any mismatches identified in p1-t1 are resolved or explicitly documented.

steps.description: Review current zed-agentops-init.sh behavior and comments against src/ behavior.
Update script logic and guidance to align with transaction-aware workflow expectations.
Cross-check alignment with .rules and README* changes.

notes: Updated embedded .rules template to match current tool list and `repo_verify` guidance.
Removed optional path wording for ops_handoff_export in the template.
Added legacy `.agent/journal.jsonl` creation to align with legacy artifact expectations.
